text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Damn... I'm not even on the scoreboard...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! You recorded the race, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Send me the data straight away so I can identify
what went wrong and rewrite the algorithm for
next time.
choice_data_list: The next race is in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? You think I need you to tell me that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just need to raise the accuracy of my program,
and the next race should go as calculated.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No way I'm gonna leave the code I've been
workin' on for so long unfinished.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Of course, first place is as good as mine.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll use every means at my disposal to get it. That
includes you, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna let anyone look down on me
again...
